Sunteck Realty Limited
2000
Year estd.
63
Projects
"At Sunteck Realty Limited, we are redefining the landscape of real estate in India, crafting spaces that elevate both living and business experiences. With each residential and commercial project, we push the boundaries of innovation, quality, and architectural brilliance, continuously evolving to surpass industry standards.

We take pride in our unwavering commitment to excellence. Our hallmark lies in precision-driven construction, cutting-edge design, and a steadfast dedication to quality. This approach has positioned us among the best real estate builders in Mumbai, earning the trust of investors, partners, and homebuyers alike.

With a legacy built on transparency and innovation, we stand as one of the most reputed real estate developers in Mumbai. From luxury residences to commercial hubs, our projects reflect our expertise, setting benchmarks in design, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

For those seeking luxurious and community-driven homes crafted by premium real estate developers in Mumbai, Sunteck Realty remains a trusted choice—blending world-class construction with timeless elegance."

LML Homes
1992
Year estd.
14
Projects
Building Credibility On The Lineage Of 32 Years Trust.

The year 1992. The seed of trust was sown in the world of finance by Mr. Suresh Chand Kothari. In its 25 eventful years, the seed has spread its roots of credibility and success in automotive and property finance. And today, it stands imposingly as Lucky Mercantile Limited, the symbol of trust and credibility. Inspired by its success in the finance world and to cash on the growing opportunities in the world of property development, Lucky Mercantile Limited ventured into the world of property development by starting LML Homes in the year 2005.

Today, in just a span of just 20 years, LML Homes, headed by Mr. Mahesh Kothari, the Managing Director and the son of Chairman Mr.Suresh Chand Kothari, has emerged as one of the most trusted property development companies in Chennai pursuing excellence in construction by building a quality home at an affordable price. Truly, the lineage of trust continues in the world of LML. We are devoted to transforming local landscapes with global lifestyles: making living experiences refreshing and authentic while creating a positive impact on the society we live in. LML Homes, one of the best real estate companies in Chennai, balances simplicity and opulence across all its spaces by creating an environment that appeals to the senses, imagination and lifestyle of our customers across diverse segments.

KG Builders
1980
Year estd.
74
Projects
We established our roots in the city in 1980 and have absorbed its culture to create strong values and virtues. KG has built an enduring relationship with the people of Chennai, through more than 184+ projects that delight more than 8400+ homeowners and corporate clients. We at KG enrich homes with passion and expertise.

With over 12+ million sq. ft. of development in the pipeline and another 14+ million sq. ft. planned to be developed over the next 3-5 years across the residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces in Chennai, we are here for good and feel great to be here. KG will soon expand its presence with a spectrum of real estate projects across Hyderabad and Bengaluru.

We at KG have always believed that the key to growth lies in harmonious relationships. Our special bond with Chennai has carried us through a successful journey of 44 years. And many more to come.
